textByHashes.07a41ca739c8457a3e6b766280872d02ef991bbe: Sorry, can't talk to ye right now. Busy with paperwork. If ye need anythin', talk t' Captain Pudi over by the dock.
textByHashes.36b9e4b2a01886fbcb66c11e8d70be2a2f17a844: What can I do for ye? I be quite busy with paperwork.
textByHashes.1b7c29fc6626fb887e40717b9550c6f79c2c6041: Aye, I can tell ye what happened.
textByHashes.6985203206511e5f58b594ec87229ffcc4b81d98: We be out on our fortnightly fishin' trip, I was doin' me normal work. Setting up the nets, swabbing the deck and the like.
textByHashes.7379a665beac947ea2e5ba2931ed3331240d774f: 'Twas a good hawl t' start, plenty of manta ray and snappers. But we would be movin' on the next day to our deep sea fishin' spot.
textByHashes.cd724940a076a7674afb9e660f0276bebe086ec7: 'Twas nothin' but smooth sailin' to our deep sea spot near Karamja, but on the way I noticed more debris in the water than usual.
textByHashes.390601dc61a96080753d4094ca7fb33b1c365040: Aye, 'twas. Most of the time, it be nets or items people throw off ships that they don't need. This had me worried a bit.
textByHashes.561a398c635f388de895cefa60201a54fd9af8ac: There was a lack of fish in the water, 'twas kind of... eerie.
textByHashes.4182050d79c4f6ba918e8b9a1f5f865684ae32be: The next day, Koanee changed the ship's course, but that be because of a storm on the horizon.
textByHashes.cb8955a489416b2685dea5f40aea1efcc47cf225: But the storm seemed t' be... following us. As if it had a mind of its own.
textByHashes.7546ad145c206d6c69318ed4c8489c009d4ea1cc: The wind started a blowin' and the fog started a showin', huge waves crashing against the boat.
textByHashes.06be55616250f1041db25a5a94247d1ae199f3d7: The ship started fallin' apart. I rushed to the cook's quarters and found 'im layin' on the floor with a plank over 'im.
textByHashes.76b793fd6f79a2356cd3623d342b62a978678e0a: I brought 'im up to the top deck and tied 'im to a piece of loose wood. I did the same t' the Skipper and Navigator.
textByHashes.7befd30b3959821102730b0118b3c3acf55466ad: Aye, it be lucky indeed. But that not be the end of it. As the ship finished sinking, I balanced out the wood so we did not slip.
textByHashes.91ffcc15717f74527bb668f3b69d82e14e9608d3: In the distance I saw glowing eyes and a large monster sorta thing in the fog movin' t'wards us.
textByHashes.c381e0bf8257f4e4c15e1b7868213b2df6fa8cc1: But all of a sudden, it vanished. I then had to keep us afloat 'till we made it t' shore by Al Kharid.
textByHashes.d286dc4a0bd921e6606da1178cb241f3e81e208f: Pudi gathered us up and we went t' the Chancellor as soon as we could stand.
textByHashes.a460f2fb7a0738774493e1b939f2f266dcfe59ba: These ruins turned out t' be a great base to research the beast from undisturbed! Bit close to Menaphos though, aye?
textByHashes.8c069444cdaa1db2cdbd7df54f34a6b66de59e96: That be the end of me story. Can I help ye with anything else?
textByHashes.4ca1741748c3f1f35f8270c410458083551c86f3: Let me guess, ye thought we be doin' nothing but pluderin' and pillagin'?
textByHashes.4ea29e678294a8a1093f3888e63321446bae4ed8: I'm not goin' t' let one bit of bad luck keep me down.
textByHashes.269a4b45fee63557a828c7462e2f5097ffbc7368: Can I help ye with anything else?
textByHashes.30ffd9f89668b524db1131f7fe0d6d3e3bebb220: Tempoross can summon clouds that shoot lightnin'. They can cause fires that will block ye from movin' about as freely.
textByHashes.f0c4f6eaa05d4ea6a4e467f38130040fdf183a22: Ye best be ready to grab a bucket and douse the fire before it spreads!
textByHashes.08de2c90747b7dad0c53cccdcfdc66f2933432ef: Can I help ye with anythin' else?
textByHashes.6ef6ef6066a98ba7ca632779aec87693e824c768: Um... no, I don't want your damp egg, thanks...
textByHashes.e6cf6081e267e16187cf51709d0996c2287c0445: This is some comfort to be sure.
